Results for 'Normandy France food attractions D-Day beaches' in Normandy, France:
1. Restaurant L'Ephémère (près de la plage d'Omaha) [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.9 (1400 reviews) | €20–40

   📍 la Percée, Château d'Englesqueville, Le Haut Chemin

   "... to see, but still an important visit on your Normandy beaches tour."
